title: BUG: Stray closing tag in healthcheck page
notes: File: src/presentation/pages/healthcheck.ts:65. Extra with no matching opening tag. Fix: remove stray tag.

title: Replace waitForTimeout with DOM assertions in E2E specs
close_reason: Removed all 10 waitForTimeout calls: 5 in db-selector.spec.ts (assertions already auto-retry), 5 in theme-toggle.spec.ts (replaced with toHaveAttribute DOM assertions via ThemeTogglePOM).

title: EPIC: Fix interest rating 0 treated as falsy across codebase
BUG: Unused generic parameter _E in wrapPromise
notes: File: src/infrastructure/storage/utils.ts:5. _E declared but never used. Fix: remove parameter.

title: Phase 3d: JobBoard aggregate ResultAsync to Effect
close_reason: Phase 3d: JobBoard aggregate migrated from ResultAsync to Effect.Effect

title: BUG: Hardcoded fallback API key 'dev-api-key' in extension-api.plugin.ts
notes: File: src/application/server/plugins/extension-api.plugin.ts:58. process.env.BROWSER_EXTENSION_API_KEY ?? 'dev-api-key' allows unauthenticated API access when env var unset. Fix: require env var or disable extension API when unconfigured.

title: Phase 3c: InterviewStage aggregate ResultAsync to Effect
close_reason: Phase 3c: InterviewStage aggregate migrated from ResultAsync to Effect.Effect

title: BUG: Unquoted HTML attributes in navbar component
notes: File: src/presentation/components/navbar.ts:45-54. href=${home.href} without quotes. Fix: quote all attribute values.

title: BUG: Static plugin serves TypeScript source and test files at /utils/*
notes: File: src/application/server/startElysiaServer.ts:117-122. staticPlugin({ assets: 'src/presentation/utils', prefix: '/utils' }) exposes .ts source and .test.ts files. Fix: remove plugin or restrict to compiled JS only.

title: refactor: move domain logic from application-route-helpers to domain layer
notes: application-route-helpers.ts (213 LOC) contains createApplicationStatus() which has domain knowledge (which labels are active vs inactive) but lives in the application layer. extractApplicationData() mixes ArkType parsing with form-to-domain transformation. No dedicated test file — logic is tested indirectly through plugin integration tests. Moving to domain enables direct unit testing.

title: BUG: Import script fetches all applications per iteration — O(n*m) duplicate check
notes: File: scripts/import-data.ts:102-120. getAllJobApplications() called inside loop for each imported record. Fix: fetch once before loop, pass array to duplicate check.

title: BUG: seedJobBoards() is fire-and-forget — async not awaited
notes: File: src/domain/use-cases/create-sqlite-job-app-manager.ts:483-488. ResultAsync from seedCommonBoards() not awaited. Race condition on startup. Fix: await seeding before accepting requests.
close_reason: Fixed by Phase 3d: seedJobBoards() now uses Effect.runPromise() with catchAll error handler — no longer fire-and-forget

title: Inject UUID generation into note.ts entity via DI parameter
description: src/domain/entities/note.ts imports uuidProvider from infrastructure, violating the Dependency Rule. Add generateId parameter to createNotesCollectionManager() and thread to getNewNoteId(). Update 14 call sites in note.test.ts with deterministic mock.\n\nAC: Re-run /quality:bfs-audit — note.ts has zero infrastructure imports. All tests pass.
close_reason: generateId parameter injected into createNotesCollectionManager. uuidProvider import removed from note.ts. 14 test call sites updated with deterministic mock. Note: assert() should use safe parse (follow-up).

title: BUG: Unescaped errorMessage in add-application-form HTML
notes: File: src/presentation/components/add-application-form.ts:9. errorMessage interpolated without escaping. Fix: HTML-escape the value.

title: EPIC: Add centralized HTML escaping to prevent XSS across presentation layer
BUG: transformUpdateData missing ArkErrors check after objectJsonSchema parse
notes: File: src/application/server/utils/application-route-helpers.ts:134-138. No instanceof ArkErrors guard after objectJsonSchema(body). Operates on error object as if it were data. Fix: add ArkErrors check immediately after parse.

title: Phase 2: Domain entities sync Result to Either
close_reason: Phase 2 complete: migrated sync Result→Either across 5 entity files (job-application, contact, interview-stage, job-board, note + noteScope), 3 analytics use-cases, 3 presentation consumers, 3 SQLite adapters, 3 in-memory adapters, 2 test files. All 296 tests pass, typecheck clean.

title: Duplicate SQLite Database handles bypass singleton in contact/interview-stage factories
acceptance_criteria: Given the server starts, When contactRepository and interviewStageRepository resolve their Database handle, Then both use the same Database instance as jobAppManagerRegistry (object identity ===). Given a contact is created via contactRepository, When queried via the shared connection, Then the record is visible. Misleading 'singleton' comments in factory files removed or corrected. Integration test verifies shared connection.
notes:
Location: src/infrastructure/factories/create-sqlite-contact-repo.ts and create-sqlite-interview-stage-repo.ts — each calls new Database() directly instead of using the SQLiteConnection singleton. No schema init, no transactional consistency across repos. Fix: inject the shared Database instance from the composition root (same pattern as job-app-manager factory). Found by council review during BFS Phase 0 audit.

## Triage Round 1 — FAIL (testability=3, completeness=3)
### Gaps
- No Given/When/Then AC (added)
- No test coverage plan — neither adapter has test files
- Misleading comment in factory files says 'singleton' but creates new Database()
- Blocked with no upstream dependency
### Improvements Applied
- Added formal AC with Given/When/Then
- Integration test for shared connection in scope
- Stale comments must be fixed as part of this bead
- Cross-repo transaction scope deferred (not in scope for this bead)
close_reason: Fixed: both factory files now use jobAppManagerRegistry.getDatabase() instead of new Database(). Removed 20 lines of duplicate code, misleading comments, and unused imports. 281/281 tests pass, tsc clean.

title: Note entity: getAll() returns err on empty, update() skips validation and updatedAt
notes:
Pre-existing debt in src/domain/entities/note.ts found during x67 bead-cycle review:
1. getAll() returns err on empty collection — empty is valid state, should return ok([])
2. update() skips NoteProps validation — caller can store invalid content
3. update() doesn't set updatedAt automatically — entity should own timestamps
4. Test: fakeId literals passed as raw strings instead of NoteId.assert()
5. Test: 'different timestamps' test asserts on content, not timestamps
Source: simplify + expert-review phases of jobapptracker-x67 bead-cycle

title: BUG: formatInterestRating treats rating 0 as falsy, returns empty string
notes: File: src/presentation/utils/pipeline-utils.ts:41. if (!rating) catches 0. Fix: use rating == null instead of !rating.

title: Phase 3a: JobApplication aggregate ResultAsync to Effect
close_reason: Phase 3a complete: migrated JobApplicationManager port from ResultAsync to Effect.Effect, rewrote SQLite adapter, updated in-memory test double, migrated 5 plugin consumers + route helpers + analytics-aggregator bridge, updated 4 test files. All 296 tests pass, zero type errors.

title: BUG: Transform hook reassigns destructured body — PUT updates silently broken
notes: File: src/application/server/plugins/applications.plugin.ts:158-167,192-201. Reassigning destructured 'body' param does not mutate Elysia context. transformUpdateData result is discarded. Fix: mutate context directly with Object.assign or context.body assignment.

title: refactor: extract shared analytics filter/group/aggregate patterns
notes: analytics.ts (436 LOC) + analytics-aggregator.ts (156 LOC) + analytics-interviews.ts (440 LOC) + analytics-contacts.ts (283 LOC) = 1,315 LOC across 4 files. All operate on JobApplication[] arrays with similar filter/group/aggregate patterns. The aggregator is a thin pass-through. Each file re-implements date filtering and grouping independently. analytics.test.ts is 947 lines — the largest test file. Consolidating shared patterns would reduce test duplication.

title: BUG: _isOverdue computed but never used in renderApplicationDetailsEdit
notes: File: src/presentation/components/application-details-renderer.ts:195. const _isOverdue = isApplicationOverdue(app) — never referenced. Fix: remove or use for edit form styling.

title: BUG: Unnecessary dotenv/config import — Bun auto-loads .env
notes: File: processEnvFacade.ts:2. import 'dotenv/config' is redundant with Bun runtime. Fix: remove import.

title: BUG: Generate endpoint silently swallows createJobApplication errors
notes: File: src/application/server/plugins/applications.plugin.ts:444-447. ResultAsync return value not checked for .isErr(). Failed creations are invisible to user. Fix: collect results and report failures.
close_reason: Fixed by Phase 3a: generate endpoint now uses Effect.runPromise() which throws on error, caught by surrounding try/catch block that renders error to user

title: Encapsulate raw locators into POMs (ThemeTogglePOM + ApplicationDetailsPOM)
close_reason: Created ThemeTogglePOM and ApplicationDetailsPOM, registered in base.ts, rewrote theme-toggle.spec.ts and navigation.spec.ts to use POM methods.

title: BUG: Contact/interview-stage repos create separate DB connections bypassing singleton
notes: File: src/domain/use-cases/create-sqlite-contact-repo.ts:10 and create-sqlite-interview-stage-repo.ts:10. Both call new Database(dbPath) instead of using jobAppManagerRegistry.getDatabase(). Fix: use singleton connection.
close_reason: Duplicate of jobapptracker-gqg — same bug (duplicate DB handles), but this bead references pre-relocation paths (src/domain/use-cases/). Superseded by gqg which has correct infrastructure/factories/ paths.

title: BUG: jobDescription rendered without HTML escaping (stored XSS)
notes: File: src/presentation/components/application-details-renderer.ts:131. Raw interpolation of user content. Fix: HTML-escape output.

title: BUG: Redundant third condition in isRemote computation
notes: File: src/application/server/utils/application-route-helpers.ts:78-81. Third condition (isRemoteValue as unknown) === 'true' is identical to second. Fix: remove duplicate.

title: EPIC: Remove dead code (unused functions, parameters, imports)
Phase 3b: Contact aggregate ResultAsync to Effect
close_reason: Phase 3b: Contact aggregate migrated from ResultAsync to Effect.Effect

title: BUG: Healthcheck page renders BROWSER_EXTENSION_API_KEY in HTML
notes: Credential exposure: API key rendered in HTML healthcheck response, visible to anyone hitting /api/health

title: BUG: Extension popup sends status field that server schema ignores
notes: File: extension/popup/popup.js:103. Sends status: formData.get('status') || 'applied' but extensionCreateApplicationSchema has no status field. User's status selection is silently discarded. Fix: add status to schema or remove from popup UI.

title: BUG: Interest rating 0 silently dropped — not in allowed values check
notes: File: src/application/server/utils/application-route-helpers.ts:97. Check uses ['1','2','3'].includes() which excludes '0'. Schema allows 0<=n<4. Fix: include '0' or align schema to 1<=n<4.

title: BUG: Unescaped company/positionTitle in HTML value attributes
notes: File: src/presentation/components/table-row-renderer.ts:118. value="${app.company}" allows attribute injection via quotes. Fix: HTML-escape values in attributes.

title: neverthrow→Effect Phase 0+1: setup, error types, bridge, run-effect helper
close_reason: Phase 0+1 complete: installed effect@3.21.0, created 4 aggregate error types (Data.TaggedError), FileIOError, barrel export, bridge module, runEffect helper

title: refactor: split contact-list and interview-stage-list into separate list and form components
notes: contact-list.ts (284 LOC) and interview-stage-list.ts (305 LOC) each export functions that handle both list rendering AND form rendering. The caller must know which function to call for which HTMX target. Splitting into renderContactList()/renderContactForm() and renderInterviewStagesList()/renderInterviewStageForm() enables independent testing of each concern.

title: BUG: JSON.stringify does not escape </script> in inline script tags
notes: File: src/application/server/plugins/applications.plugin.ts:392. Import endpoint injects stdout/stderr into inline script via JSON.stringify which does not escape </script>. Fix: replace </script> sequences in stringified output.

title: BUG: createJobApplication returns statusLog:[] violating >0 schema constraint
notes: File: src/domain/entities/job-application.ts:136. Schema requires AppStatusEntry[] > 0 but function returns empty array. Fix: make private or add initial status entry.

title: NoteId.assert() throws inside NeverThrow .map() chain — not Result-safe
acceptance_criteria: Given generateId returns a value that fails NoteId validation, When add() is called, Then the Result is an Err (not an exception). Given generateId returns a valid value, When add() is called, Then the note is created and returned as Ok. All callers of createNotesCollectionManager updated to pass () => NoteId. Regression test covers invalid-id path.
notes:
Location: src/domain/entities/note.ts:60 — NoteId.assert(generateId()) inside .map() callback. assert() throws on invalid input, bypassing NeverThrow's error channel. Fix: replace with noteModule.NoteId(generateId()) + instanceof type.errors check. Also type generateId as () => NoteId instead of () => string. Found by council review during BFS Phase 0 audit.

## Triage Round 1
### Scores
scope_clarity=5, estimability=5, testability=4, completeness=4 — PASS
### Size: 2 (Fibonacci)
### Gaps
- No Given/When/Then AC (added)
- generateId signature change impacts callers — need audit
- No explicit regression test requirement (added to AC)
### Improvements Applied
- Added formal AC with Given/When/Then
- Required caller audit for generateId type change
- Required regression test for invalid-id path
close_reason: Fixed: NoteId.assert() removed from .map() chain, generateId typed as () => NoteId. Regression test covers both Ok and Err paths. 281/281 tests pass, tsc clean.

title: BUG: createOptionalFields drops interestRating of 0 via truthiness check
notes: File: src/application/server/plugins/extension-api.plugin.ts:147. body.interestRating && {...} short-circuits on 0. Fix: use body.interestRating != null.

title: Phase 1.5: Pre-migration extractions for Effect-TS migration
close_reason: Phase 1.5 pre-migration extractions complete: extracted collectDaysToFirstInterview, normalized toArkResult→ArkErrors, converted dynamic→static imports in applications.plugin, converted IIFE→factory in extension-api.plugin

title: BUG: Validation error messages rendered in HTML without escaping (reflected XSS)
notes: File: src/application/server/startElysiaServer.ts:54. errorMessage interpolated into HTML div. Fix: HTML-escape errorMessage.

title: BUG: _assertIsJobApplicationForCreate defined but never called
notes: File: src/domain/entities/job-application.ts:90-94. Dead code. Fix: remove function.

title: BUG: jobPostingUrl rendered in href without scheme validation (javascript: XSS)
notes: File: src/presentation/components/application-details-renderer.ts:122. Direct interpolation into href attribute. Fix: validate URL scheme (http/https only) and HTML-escape attribute value.

title: Relocate SQLite factory files from domain/use-cases to infrastructure/factories
description:
4 create-sqlite-*.ts files in src/domain/use-cases/ import bun:sqlite and infrastructure adapters, violating the Dependency Rule. Move to src/infrastructure/factories/. Update 9 callers including startElysiaServer.ts, 4 plugins, scripts/import-data.ts, and 3 test files. Note: create-sqlite-job-app-manager.ts (556 lines) is the composition root with SQLiteConnection singleton.

Ordering: Execute after Bead 1.

AC: Re-run /quality:bfs-audit — no files under src/domain/ import bun:sqlite or src/infrastructure/.
close_reason: 4 factory files relocated to src/infrastructure/factories/. 9 callers updated. SQLiteConnection singleton preserved. All 280 tests pass.

title: Move ForUpdate type from infrastructure to domain ports
description:
Domain ports (contact-repository, interview-stage-repository, job-application-manager) import ForUpdate<T> from src/infrastructure/storage/storage-provider-interface.ts, violating the Dependency Rule. Extract ForUpdate<T> to src/domain/ports/common-types.ts and update all 8 consumers.

Ordering: Execute before Bead 3.

AC: Re-run /quality:bfs-audit — no port files import from src/infrastructure/.
close_reason: ForUpdate type extracted to src/domain/ports/common-types.ts. 8 consumers updated. Re-export in storage-provider-interface.ts for backward compat. Note: 3 test adapters still import via re-export path (minor follow-up).

title: Fix presentation lint violations (template-literals, as-cast, raw Response)
close_reason: Fixed template-literals (pipeline-utils.ts, pipeline-client.ts), removed as-unknown-as cast (timer type), replaced raw Response in Elysia handler. Rebuilt pipeline-client.js.
